text:
The user is asking how to access the context file I created (IEC_Context.md). The file is in their Downloads/IEC directory. They want to know how to read or use it.

I should explain how they can access it:
1. They can open it directly in their file explorer
2. They can read it using any text editor
3. They can ask me questions and I'll refer to it

The file is at: /home/bot4u/Downloads/IEC/IEC_Context.md

I should give them simple instructions on how to access it.
